Imagine, Build, Automate: Pioneering the Next Era of Industrial Robotics and Simulation

People

People

Faculty members and doctoral researchers currently listed in the RAMSLAB roster.

11 people records ordered manually from collection metadata
Full Professor

Hermes Giberti

Full Professor at the University of Pavia working in applied mechanics, robotics, and automated mechanical system design.
applied mechanics · robotics
hermes.giberti@unipv.it
Associate Professor

Marco Carnevale

Associate Professor focused on applied mechanics, machine design, and biorobotics at the University of Pavia.
applied mechanics · machine design
marco.carnevale@unipv.it
Associate Professor

Valentina Furlan

Associate Professor working on manufacturing technologies, integrated production systems, and industrial laser applications.
manufacturing technologies · production systems
valentina.furlan@unipv.it
Assistant Professor

Nicola Giulietti

Assistant Professor working across measurement systems, artificial vision, and mechanical and thermal sensing.
measurement systems · artificial vision
nicola.giulietti@unipv.it
PhD Candidate

Federico Insero

PhD candidate associated with robot-assisted additive manufacturing and robotic 3D printing workflows.
additive manufacturing · robotic systems
Assistant Professor

Carol Sergenti

Assistant Professor active in applied mechanics, robotics, and biorobotics-related teaching and research.
applied mechanics · robotics
carol.sergenti@unipv.it
PhD Candidate

José Alfonso Farias Fuentes

PhD candidate working on dynamic simulation, motion cueing, and hardware-in-the-loop environments for industrial engineering applications.
dynamic simulation · motion cueing
josealfonso.fariasfuentes01@universitadipavia.it
PhD Candidate

Giuseppe Mangano

PhD candidate focused on simulation systems for sport and rehabilitation, with experience in driving simulator design.
simulation systems · sport and rehabilitation

PhD Candidate

Davide Fabiocchi

PhD candidate working on industrial human-robot collaboration through virtual simulation.
human-robot collaboration · virtual simulation
PhD Candidate

Davide Todesca

PhD candidate focused on vision-based motion reconstruction and simulation-oriented human movement analysis.
computer vision · human movement analysis
PhD Candidate

Davide Zhou

PhD candidate working on robotics for manufacturing and future-oriented production systems.
manufacturing robotics · production systems
